name: Leeky Crockpot
recipeIngredient: 1 can blue lake green beans, whole
4 dashes Tabasco sauce or other hot
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop all vegetables roughly.
2. Add the chopped veggies to the crockpot.
3. Open the cans and add their contents to the crockpot, using the liquid from the green beans for the "water" can and adding more liquid if needed to make a full can.
4. Add the mushrooms (consider using shiitake or morels for added flavor, but plain will work as well).
5. Add the remaining ingredients and mix thoroughly.
6. Set the crockpot on low for 6 hours. It is ready after this time but will continue to cook for another 12 hours on low.
7. Refrigerate any leftovers overnight.
8. The dish freezes well in a sealed container.
Optional low-fat version:
Change the cream of mushroom soup to low-fat chicken broth and add a handful of dry large lima beans (also known as butter beans) for added texture.
